name: Colourful Corn Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the onions, tomatoes, carrots, red pepper, chili, garlic, and spices to a large heavy-based saucepan with 1/2 pint (1 cup) of stock. Cover and bring to a boil, then simmer for 3-5 minutes. Stir in the potatoes and continue simmering for 3-4 more minutes until the liquid has nearly evaporated.
2. Stir in the remaining stock, cover partially and simmer until the potatoes are almost tender, about 5 minutes. Stir in the corn, season with salt and pepper, and simmer until all the vegetables are tender.
3. Remove 1 cupful of the soup and blend it. Return it to the pan. Mix together the milk and milk powder and add to the soup. Simmer for a few more minutes and adjust the seasoning as needed.
